hero.title: Sample Isle
hero.dek: A demo dossier showing every module the template renders.

intro: This is placeholder intro copy for the dossier template example. Replace content.json, regions.geojson and places.geojson with your own to build a real dossier.
The interactive map below shows town regions and categorized places; the modules that follow are driven entirely by content.json.

listing.label: Most expensive listing
listing.body: Placeholder copy for the marquee listing module: the record sale, its buyer and agents, and the details that make it notable. Replace with your own.
